title: selaginella wangpeishanii
intro: Selaginella wangpeishanii, also known as the 'Wang Pei Shan spikemoss' or 'Wang Pei Shan club moss', is a species of plant in the Selaginella genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella wangpeishanii include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of various diseases. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
